system.description:
A Shamanic Conjurer is a Magical Adept who follows the Shamanic tradition and specialises entirely in Conjuring. They can summon and banish Nature Spirits but cannot cast spells. They must choose a Totem and receive their Totem's bonuses and penalties for conjuring where applicable.

Magical Adepts have no access to astral space whatsoever — neither astral perception nor astral projection.

SR2E p.163
